positive: Stylized abstract tropical jungle scene, featuring interconnected minimalist flora elements like large monstera leaves, palmetto fronds, and exotic heliconia flowers, forming a dense, interlocking silhouette pattern. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, creating a visually balanced tapestry perfect for repeating print placement. Use a restricted, vibrant color palette of deep emerald green, turquoise blue, mustard yellow, and creamy ivory. The artwork must have clean, sharp edges and strong contrast for maximum pop on fabric, mimicking a sophisticated woodcut or screen-printed poster style. High saturation, clean vector look, decorative pattern design, maximalist symmetry.
